summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 3. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: 8 section tabs, 53 categories with sourceKey+fieldKeys pattern, 6 user lists in Users section, 4 themes, EN/TR language switching, splash screen with SCUM Ranger animation, info tooltips on fields, and settings persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Server start/stop is SIMULATED (status toggle in DB only) - real process spawn is in Electron for Windows build as documented
Disk wizard in container shows most disks as ineligible (<30GB free) - expected behavior, /etc/hosts auto-selected as eligible
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state before each test run. New user files: ServerSettingsAdminUsers.ini (1 entry: 76561199169074640), WhitelistedUsers.ini (empty), SilencedUsers.ini (empty)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features working. Backend tests cover: 8 sections (essentials/gameplay/world/economy/security/users/advanced/client), 53 categories with sourceKey+fieldKeys pattern, new user lists (whitelisted/silenced/server_admins), export/import for new file keys. Frontend uses data-testid attributes: section-tab-{key}, panel-{category_key}, field-{category}-{fieldKey}, theme-option-{key}, lang-option-{code}. Splash screen appears for ~2.4s with SCUM Ranger animation. Default language is English. 4 themes: obsidian (default), midnight_ops, forest_camo, blood_moon.

backend: Schema sections: essentials, gameplay, world, economy, security, users, advanced, client
Category sourceKey+fieldKeys pattern: essentials_identity has sourceKey='srv_general' and fieldKeys=[scum.ServerName, scum.ServerDescription, ...]
Users section has 6 user list categories: admins, server_admins, whitelisted, exclusive, banned, silenced
POST /api/servers - creates server with users_whitelisted=[], users_silenced=[], users_server_admins=[{steam_id: 76561199169074640}]
POST /api/servers/{id}/import/whitelisted - parses steam IDs and flags
POST /api/servers/{id}/import/silenced - parses steam IDs and flags
POST /api/servers/{id}/import/server_admins - parses steam IDs and flags
frontend: Splash screen (data-testid='splash-screen') with SCUM Ranger animation, progress bar, boot log - transitions in ~2.4s
Default language is English (localStorage empty → EN)
8 section tabs: ESSENTIALS, GAMEPLAY, WORLD & NPCS, ECONOMY, SECURITY & RAID, USERS, ADVANCED, CLIENT DEFAULTS
Essentials section panels: essentials_identity, essentials_access, essentials_performance, essentials_wipe
Users section panels: users_admins, users_server_admins, users_whitelisted, users_exclusive, users_banned, users_silenced
Fields with metadata show translated labels (e.g. 'Server Name') and info tooltip on hover
Info tooltip shows description (e.g. 'Displayed name in the public server browser. Max 50 characters recommended.')
Theme picker: 4 options - Obsidian, Midnight Ops, Forest Camo, Blood Moon
Theme selection sets data-theme attribute on <html> and changes CSS variables
Language switcher: EN ↔ TR - category labels update correctly
Turkish labels: TEMEL, OYNANŞ, DÜNYA VE NPC, EKONOMİ, GÜVENLİK VE RAID, KULLANICILAR, GELİŞMİŞ, İSTEMCİ VARSAYILANLARI
Settings save: field changes → save-settings-btn → reload → changes persist
Admin prompt and disk wizard flow unchanged and working
